basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Senior Project Assistant (SPA) Notification 2026 has been released on 23 June 2026 on the official website aiims.edu. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Assistant (SPA) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: Relaxation as per AIIMS/ICMR rules

qualification.education_qualification: 12th pass or equivalent from a recognized board with 5 years' experience of administrative work and a speed test of not less than 8000 key depressions per hour (kdph) on computer OR Graduate in any discipline with 2 years' experience of administration work and a speed test of not less than 8000 key depressions per hour (kdph) on computer
qualification.details: 12th pass or equivalent from a recognized board with 5 years' experience of administrative work and a speed test of not less than 8000 key depressions per hour (kdph) on computer. OR Graduate in any discipline with 2 years' experience of administration work and a speed test of not less than 8000 key depressions per hour (kdph) on computer.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on Google Form Interview (offline/online)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Assistant (SPA) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Assistant (SPA) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Assistant (SPA) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Assistant (SPA) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the AIIMS Delhi Senior Project Assistant (SPA) recruitment is 08-07-2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Project Assistant (SPA) post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have passed 12th grade with 5 years of administrative experience and a specific typing speed, or be a graduate with 2 years of administrative experience and the same typing speed.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Project Assistant (SPA) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Project Assistant (SPA) post is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per AIIMS/ICMR rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Assistant (SPA) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Senior Project Assistant (SPA) post will receive a salary of Rs. 29200 Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Project Assistant (SPA) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Project Assistant (SPA) position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is online. Candidates need to apply through the official website or the provided online application link.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Senior Project Assistant (SPA) post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their Google Form applications, followed by an interview, which can be conducted offline or online.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: This is a contract job. The recruitment is for a contractual position at AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.
